title: Nursery Rhyme. DCL. Relics.
content:
High diddle doubt, my candle out,
            My little maid is not at home:
        Saddle my hog, and bridle my dog,
            And fetch my little maid home.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCL. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
